name: SOCi Social
highlight_text: Best for posting local content on social media
description:
What SOCi Social Does

SOCi’s social media tool is built specifically for multi-location brands who want to enhance their social media presence to gain local relevance. Although the UI is a little uptight, the platform has some great features that you can utilize to keep your content plan consistent. SOCi's Genius Social feature utilizes AI to analyze diverse data sources and deliver deep local insights, shaping hyper-localized content strategies and engagement approaches.

‍

Key Features

  • Enhance efficiency and save time through AI-optimized workflows tailored for multi-location marketing.
  • Access AI-generated monthly content calendars tailored to each location's local audience preferences and trends.
  • Receive on-brand, automatically crafted engagement replies, maintaining a unified brand voice across all locations.
  • Easily create quality posts, contests, and coupons for multiple pages across major platforms with a single click.
  • Access a curated library of engaging, on-brand content assets, saving time and ensuring brand consistency.
  • Supports Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, and Google Business Profile.
  • Monitor and manage all social media engagements, including questions, comments, private messages, and tweets, at the national level.
  • Assign engagements to local teams through rules-based assignments, ensuring timely responses and customer satisfaction.
  • Receive timely notifications and leverage automated smart rules to ensure every engagement is addressed promptly.

Benefits of SOCi Social

  • Benefit from content that dynamically adapts to emerging trends and local audience preferences, ensuring maximum relevance and engagement.
  • Empower local marketing teams to publish localized, brand-consistent content and perform real-time customer care across social networks.
  • Leverage AI as a virtual data analyst and trained marketer at every location, ensuring consistency and relevance.
  • Maintain a seamless localized social strategy without missing opportunities to engage with audiences.

Pricing

They offer custom pricing

Pros

✅Offers great insights for localized content

✅AI-powered platform with great data capabilities

Cons

❌Has posting limitations – users can’t schedule pictures and videos together on certain platforms

❌Auto-posting feature doesn’t come up with super relevant content so needs a watch

‍
